name: Shenzhen Noposion Agrochemicals Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Noposion Agrochemicals Co.,Ltd develops, produces and sells agricultural inputs. The company offers pesticide preparations and plant nutrition products; and professional agricultural services, including technical and personnel support, farming, financial, agricultural information, agricultural products supply chain, and other services, as well as sensors and actuators. It provides its products under the Nuopuxin, Rui Defeng, Standard, and Nuopuxin names. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
